scripts.dev:
node -e "console.log('
  Local app (open in browser):
  http://localhost:5173

  API health check:
  http://localhost:3000/api/health
')" && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run start:dev -w api" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w api && npm run build -w web
scripts.db:seed: docker compose exec -T mysql mysql -uroot -proot < db/seed.sql
